acceptance_criteria: README includes a self-hosting workflow section with at least one complete command sequence from requirement selection through task/requirement closure.
All documented commands in the self-hosting section include explicit `--project-root "$(pwd)"` usage where automation is shown.
AGENTS.md documents CLI-only `.ao` mutation policy and task logging expectations (before work, during work, completion).
README and AGENTS.md contain no conflicting instructions for project root resolution, daemon registry usage, or status transitions.
A new contributor can execute the documented workflow on a clean clone and produce at least one updated task status without manual `.ao` file edits.
description:
Contributors can reliably use `ao` to plan, execute, and close work in this repository without undocumented steps.

**Implementation boundary:** This requirement covers contributor-facing workflow documentation and repository operating rules (`README` and `AGENTS.md`) for this repo only. It does not include CLI feature development.
title: Define and maintain the ao-cli self-hosting operating workflow
